ralph-development-result.ralph-summary: All implementation steps completed successfully. The CSS to Tailwind migration for complete, all 6 components converted from custom CSS to Tailwind utility classes. Tests updated for new features (lifecycle actions, phase summary overlay, transport state display) added and and passing. All planned verification steps. Tailwind config extended with fadeIn, phasePulse, and statusPulse animations. Angular build and tests, and Rust build/clippy all pass without no errors or warnings.
